name: Le Bar a Vin de Bordeaux
summary: CIVB-backed Bordeaux wine bar near the Grand Theatre, useful for an easy city-center tasting flight.
whyItMatters: This is the most obvious Bordeaux orientation stop: central, wine-specific, and tied to the official Bordeaux wine trade site.
pros: Official Bordeaux.com page identifies it as a must-visit Bordeaux wine address.
Central location makes it easy to pair with a walk around the historic core.
cons: Likely popular with visitors; verify race-week crowding and whether groups need to queue.
Official page was sourceable but machine extraction of current hours was noisy.

logistics.opening_hours: Needs final verification on the official page before promotion.
logistics.reservation_needed: Unknown; likely walk-in-oriented, but verify for race week.
logistics.distance_from_viewing_point: Central Bordeaux; verify against the selected stage-7 viewing point.
logistics.transit: Central tram/walkable area; verify nearest stop after lodging is known.
logistics.parking: Unknown; avoid relying on driving in central Bordeaux on race day.
logistics.road_closure_notes: Stage 7 finishes in Bordeaux; do not assume normal access on Fri Jul 10, 2026.

timing.best_visit_window: Non-race evening or after road closures clear on the Bordeaux finish day.
timing.race_day_risk: High on Fri Jul 10, 2026 because central Bordeaux access and crowds may be affected.

sources.title: Bordeaux.com - Le Bar a Vin de Bordeaux
sources.note: Official Bordeaux wine site source for the venue identity and planning relevance as a Bordeaux wine address.

open_questions: Confirm exact July 2026 opening hours and whether reservations or queues apply.
Check race-day access after Bordeaux publishes local road closure and transit notices.
